title: Authorize and run one fresh live pair after contract hardening
goal: After RAB-V1-T002E is merged and verified, prepare a new immutable pair and seek a separate reviewed authorization for exactly one baseline and one treatment process with no retry.

approval.note: This task is not authorized by registration. A new explicit authorization must bind new paths, hashes, pair, executable, credential commitment and hard cumulative cost limits after T002E verification.

acceptance.assertion: No T002D authorization, intent, ledger, output path or receipt is reused; the new pair has create-only paths and fresh cryptographic bindings.
A separately reviewed one-shot authorization is recorded only after T002E post-merge verification and remains unconsumed until the immediate launch gate passes.
At most one baseline and one treatment provider process are permitted, each with a positive hard ceiling and no retry after intent, failure or ambiguity.
Only a complete provider-backed pair with valid Lenskit receipts, distinct sessions, approved treatment RepoBrief use, bound transcripts, source integrity and observed costs may verify the task.
Any local, provider, evidence, budget or ambiguity failure consumes the authorization, blocks the task and leaves RAB-V1-T002 prohibited.
